title: BD FACSDiscover S8 - Bi-weekly Maintenance and Cleaning Protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"e6p6k","text":"This Standard Operation Procedure is intended to guide the facility staff to perform scheduled maintenance and cleaning of the instrument BD FACSDiscover S8‱.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":156,"length":1}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"emoji","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"3844237BFDC111EFB2FC0A58A9FEAC02","name":":tm:"}}}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"4mq3b","text":"This protocol should be followed:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2m287","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7tnrr","text":"Preventively every 15 days.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2t8ff","text":"After running potentially bacterial loaded samples.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"aa3gc","text":"When a bacterial/fungal contamination is detected in the weekly assessment.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e2vih","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9fe9f","text":"Perform the steps subsequently unless otherwise stated.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"ad1vj","text":"Be sure to wear gloves and lab coat at all times! ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":50}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"940o","text":"General rule: spray 70% ethanol in all connectors before plugging any tubing!","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":77}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"ajlr6","text":"Handle FACSClean carefully. It should't enter in contact with the skin and eyes (wear gloves, lab coat and glasses) and it ruins colorful clothes.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":27}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"643kk","text":"Autoclaved and mounted sheath-tank (with the sensor).","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"36nbk","text":"Autoclaved lab kitchen distilled H2O bottles.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3v94c","text":"Cleaning box.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5io06","text":"Incidin Foam.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ede55","text":"70% Ethanol.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6r8e1","text":"Distilled H2O in a 50 mL tube.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bu4jk","text":"FACS Clean.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a9jmk","text":"MAAX Windus C2.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"62hq","text":"O-ring lube.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f0lja","text":"Paper towel.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3vf17","text":"Long Q-tips.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Rinse the distilled H 2 O bottle to remove the FACSClean, then fill all bottles with its respective solutions
In the meantime of the Aseptic cleaning, remove the parts for cleaning and put them in the Cleaning Compartment box.
Switch on the PC, the instrument and then the FACSChorus software
Pull the fluidics cart, unplug the waste tank, discard it's contents and reconnect it
Go to: Run Extended Fluidics Startup

On the step 4, fill the water bottle with FACSClean Becton Dickinson (BD) Catalog #340345 instead of distilled H 2 O. Wear protective clothes, gloves and glasses every time FACSClean is handled in this protocol. Wait for 00:15:00 and then proceed to the next step
On step 5, don't connect the sheath tank!
Go to Cytometer: System Startup - Prepare for aseptic sort
Prepare the sheath tank for autoclaving and send it immediately to the lab kitchen
Spray Incidin Foam on the following parts: tube holder and splash shield
After the Aseptic Cleaning is done, remove the closed loop nozzle and put into the 50 mL tube containing DI H2O.
Clean the table and surroundings of the sorter with Incidin Foam ECOLAB Catalog #3046010

Spray carefully the entire sort chamber (use first MAXX Windus C2 ECOLAB Catalog #9084640 to remove the salt crystals, then after some minutes follow with 70% Ethanol) and dry it with soft tissue paper.
Remove the Q-tips, clean and dry both the closed loop nozzle and the nozzle lock and re-install them
Remove the nozzle lock, put into the Clean Compartment box and spray Incidin Foam ECOLAB Catalog #3046010 over it.
Clean all the parts in the box with 70% Ethanol and re-install them
Soak Q-tips with Incidin Foam ECOLAB Catalog #3046010 and insert them into the nozzle slot and nozzle lock slot. Wait for 00:10:00
On the last step, put the newly autoclaved and fully filled sheath tank in the fluidics cart. Connect the air connection to the sheath tank. Connect the sheath tank sensor.
Change the connections from the clean port to the sheath tank. Plug the bypassed connections to the sheath filter. Start the last step.
Perform an Extended Fluidics Startup
Grease the O-ring of the sample pressure chamber (by greasing the socket of the tube holder)
Insert the desired nozzle and start the stream
Purge the sheath filter 2x
creator: Daniel Gimenes
